population.description: All rows of ZENODO-DELETION-EXPORT-20260710 with removal_date in 2026 and non-empty citation_text
population.filter_rationale: Restricted to 2026 to establish the current classifier regime's behavior. Restricted to non-empty citation_text because spam-classified rows have citation_text stripped (§7 finding) and cannot be classified on either dimension.

derived_ratios.compression_interpretation: Institutional AI-augmented composition is present in the alive-side sample at approximately 30x its representation in the AI-signaled deletion pool.

underdetection_notes.field_scope: Signal detection uses citation_text field only (essentially the record's citation string). Full-text detection of both AI signals and institutional signals would find higher absolute rates. Underdetection is expected on both dimensions.
underdetection_notes.expected_symmetry: Undercounting is expected to be roughly symmetric between the two dimensions (both use short-text substring matching on the same field). The compression ratio is therefore robust to symmetric undercounting.
underdetection_notes.asymmetric_risks: Independent-institution self-signaling in citation_text (e.g., 'EPINOVA LLC') is not caught by the institutional term panel. This means the deletion-side institutional presence estimate could be slightly higher under a more permissive institutional panel. The Wu case study shows an EPINOVA-affiliated uploader whose deletion event would not be caught by the current panel.
